env.name: MEDIA_PUBLIC_URL_BASE
env.description: Public read URL the R2 bucket is served from. Custom domain preferred (https://media.example.com); pub-<hash>.r2.dev works for alpha/dev. Trailing slash optional.

env.name: MEDIA_S3_ENDPOINT
env.description: R2 S3-compatible endpoint, https://<account-id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com. Used by create_media_upload to mint presigned PUT URLs.

env.name: MEDIA_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID
env.description: R2 S3 token access-key ID. Create at Cloudflare dashboard → R2 → Manage R2 API Tokens with object-write scope on the MEDIA bucket.

env.name: MEDIA_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
env.description: R2 S3 token secret-access-key. Set via `wrangler secret put MEDIA_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` — never check in.
